title: SGPGIMS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Lab Technician Posts
description: The Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Lab Technician Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th, B.Sc., and Diploma can apply for the SGPGIMS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode.
